---
title: "Day 3 — Integration & Refinement"
subtitle: "Wednesday 17 June 2026"
---

*Groups address practical challenges from Day 2 — censoring, time-varying effects, computational efficiency — refine their analysis strategies, and prepare final presentations.*

## Schedule

| Time | Activity |
|------|----------|
| 9:00–10:00 | Open discussion: ideas, challenges, and outstanding questions |
| 10:00–10:30 | Morning break |
| 10:30–12:00 | Refine analysis plan · Implement · Prepare code examples |
| 12:00–14:00 | Lunch |
| 14:00–15:30 | Continue case study work in small groups · Prepare presentation of final analysis plan |
| 15:30–16:00 | Afternoon break |
| 16:00–17:00 | **Plenary:** Group progress reports · Identify key learnings |

---

## Materials

### Code Examples

*Annotated code from group sessions will be shared here*
